name: OpenAI
steps: Create an account or sign in
Add a payment method (required for API access)
Click "Create new secret key", name it, and copy the key (starts with sk-...)
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: Paid only. Tier 1 starts at $5 credit purchase. Rate limits increase with spend. Prompt caching available. Batch API offers 50% discount for async workloads.
